overview: Luma Nest Studio is a fictitious creative services brand designed to demonstrate how structured identity information can be transformed into a professional brand book. The brand is warm, clear, modern, and friendly, with a visual system built for digital and client-facing materials.

values.description: Communication should feel simple, useful, and easy to understand.
The brand should feel approachable, human, and supportive.
Visual materials should feel thoughtful, polished, and intentional.
Every asset should reinforce the same visual and verbal identity.

colors.name: Nest Navy
colors.usage: Primary text, headers, and formal sections.

colors.name: Luma Coral
colors.usage: Accent elements, highlights, and calls to action.

colors.name: Soft Cream
colors.usage: Backgrounds, panels, and soft layout areas.

colors.name: Sage Mist
colors.usage: Secondary accents, calm sections, and supportive graphics.

typography.usage: Main titles, section headers, and key brand statements.
Paragraph text, descriptions, and internal documentation.
Occasional editorial highlights and campaign phrases.

voice_tone.description: Use direct language and avoid unnecessary complexity.
Focus on guiding the reader rather than sounding overly promotional.
Use friendly wording without losing professionalism.

usage_guidelines.description: Keep generous margins and avoid overcrowded layouts.
Do not place the logo over visually noisy backgrounds.
Use accent colors intentionally and avoid mixing all palette colors at once.
Prefer short headings and clear supporting copy.

do_dont.do: Use soft backgrounds with strong readable text.
Use brand colors consistently across layouts.
do_dont.dont: Create new colors for each document.
Overload pages with too many decorative elements.

appendix_notes: All brand content is fictitious and shown only as a brand book automation case study.
The same structure can be adapted for style guides, visual identity handoffs, agency documentation, or startup brand kits.
The goal is to demonstrate repeatable brand documentation without manual formatting.
